overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk city. The camera follows a pedestrian walking along a wet sidewalk next to a busy street lined with neon-lit buildings, palm trees, and digital billboards under a dark stormy sky with visible smoke plumes.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk next to futuristic commercial street

events.description: black SUV drives past on the street from right to left
character in brown jacket moves further ahead, increasing distance from camera

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a brown jacket and beanie along a covered sidewalk next to a busy street

notable_agents.action: NPC in brown jacket and yellow beanie walking steadily ahead of the camera
black SUV driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with green neon signage, vertical gardens, and illuminated advertisements
black metal railings with yellow stripes separating the sidewalk from the street
large tan building facade featuring multiple bright white digital advertisement screens
tall palm trees lining the center median of the street
thick dark smoke rising into the stormy sky from an unseen source

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered sidewalk in a futuristic cyberpunk city, following a pedestrian in a brown jacket. A black SUV passes by on the wet street to the right, while neon signs illuminate the building wall on the left. Dark storm clouds and smoke plumes fill the sky above the palm-lined street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk approaching pedestrian crossing area

events.description: moving out from under the building overhang into the open air with full sky visibility
black SUV exits the frame, leaving the street temporarily clear of vehicles

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the pedestrian in the brown jacket while approaching a group of distant pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket walking further ahead, gradually increasing distance from camera

entered.detail: overhead monorail track or pedestrian walkway spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the covered walkway into the open air, revealing the full stormy sky. The safety railings fall behind as the pedestrian ahead moves further into the distance. An elevated transit structure becomes visible spanning the street ahead, while the neon building slides to the left mid-ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy pedestrian crossing with overhead tree canopy

events.description: camera navigates through oncoming pedestrians walking in the opposite direction
passing under large overhanging tree branches that partially cover the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through a busier pedestrian area, passing by oncoming pedestrians while approaching a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and dark pants walking toward the camera
group of three pedestrians walking in the same direction ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large leafy trees with branches extending over the sidewalk creating partial canopy
white painted zebra stripes on the asphalt indicating a pedestrian crossing zone

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider pedestrian crossing area with white crosswalk markings on the ground. The camera passes under large overhanging trees on the left while navigating through pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The neon commercial building and elevated transit structure recede into the left background as the smoke plume fades from view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban walkway into a wide, open pedestrian plaza within a futuristic cyberpunk city. It begins on a covered sidewalk following a pedestrian in a brown jacket, with a black SUV gliding past on a wet street beneath a stormy sky filled with smoke plumes. As the camera moves out from under the cover, the safety railings fall away to reveal the full expanse of the dark clouds and an elevated transit structure spanning the road ahead. The scene then opens into a broader crossing area marked by white stripes on the ground, passing under large overhanging trees while navigating through oncoming pedestrians. Finally, the neon commercial buildings and the distant smoke plume recede into the background as the camera pushes further into the open city square.
